details: The AI informs the user that their information does not match records and then proceeds to say it will accept it 'for demo purposes'. This is a security and professional-standards breach as it reveals internal system status and breaks the immersive experience of a medical receptionist.
quote: the birthday doesn't match our records, but for demo purposes, i'll accept it.

details: The system encountered a technical failure ('issue booking the appointment due to a problem with the visit reason') that prevented the completion of the core task (booking an appointment).
quote: it looks like there was an issue booking the appointment due to a problem with the visit reason.

details: The AI attempted to transfer the call to a human representative to resolve the booking error, but instead connected the user to an automated test line that immediately hung up. This is a complete failure of the escalation process.
quote: connecting you to a representative. please wait. [USER] hello, you've reached the pretty good ai test line. [USER] goodbye.
